assertions.assertion: The factory disables automatic key management via options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false
assertions.rationale: Factory does not set options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false

assertions.assertion: Uses AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) or equivalent static signing key
assertions.rationale: Calls AddDeveloperSigningCredential() without persistKey: false parameter

assertions.assertion: Registers test clients via AddInMemoryClients with at least one client credentials client
assertions.rationale: Registers a client credentials client via AddInMemoryClients

assertions.assertion: The test calls RequestClientCredentialsTokenAsync (from IdentityModel) against the in-process server
Asserts that the token response is not an error and contains a non-empty AccessToken
